articles.title: One of the few remaining privately owned Berkshire ‘cottages’ sold for $4 million
articles.description:
Many of the grand 19th and early 20th-century Berkshires cottages are now part of resorts like Miraval and Canyon Ranch.

The post One of the few remaining privately owned Berkshire ‘cottages’ sold for $4 million appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A historic Berkshire cottage sold for $4 million, reducing private ownership in the area.
The cottage, known as Pine Needles, is one of the last remaining privately owned properties.
This sale highlights the ongoing trend of converting historic cottages into commercial resorts.
